name: metric-analyzer
description: Query and analyze metrics for CCE clusters (Pod/Node) and cloud resources (ECS, ELB, EIP, NAT). Supports threshold-based anomaly detection and status classification.

tools.name: huawei_get_cce_pod_metrics_topN
tools.description: Run huawei_get_cce_pod_metrics_topN through the shared Huawei Cloud dispatcher.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.
